sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Ten Holdings to Present at DealFlow Discovery Conference
feed.summary: Ten Holdings, Inc. (XHLD) announced its plan to present at the DealFlow Discovery Conference on January 28-29, 2026, in Atlantic City, New Jersey. The company released an updated investor presentation to engage more effectively with investors and communicate its strategy. Despite this, TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates XHLD as Neutral due to weak financial performance and bearish technical conditions, although recent corporate actions offer some support.

feed.title: Priority Income Fund to redeem half of Series J preferred shares
feed.summary: Priority Income Fund, Inc. announced its decision to redeem 50% of its outstanding 6.000% Series J Term Preferred Stock Due 2028. This move involves redeeming 790,000 shares at $25 each, plus accrued dividends, with the redemption date set for February 25, 2026. After this, the fund will retain three other series of preferred stock, continuing its focus on senior secured loans and collateralized loan obligations, and is managed by Priority Senior Secured Income Management, LLC.

feed.title: Revvity declares quarterly dividend of $0.07 per share
feed.summary: Revvity, Inc. announced a regular quarterly dividend of $0.07 per share, payable on May 8, 2026, to shareholders of record as of April 17, 2026. This dividend marks the company's 56th consecutive year of payments, reflecting a current yield of 0.24%. Despite trading at a premium valuation with a market cap of $13.02 billion and a P/E ratio of 59.38, the health science solutions provider is set to report its next quarterly earnings in three days.

feed.title: Nucor shares drop as fourth quarter earnings miss estimates
feed.summary: Nucor Corp (NYSE:NUE) reported fourth-quarter earnings and revenue that missed analyst expectations, leading to a 3.2% drop in its shares during after-hours trading. Despite the miss, the company's adjusted quarterly earnings improved significantly year-over-year. Nucor anticipates an increase in earnings across all operating segments in the first quarter of 2026 and maintained a strong financial position with substantial cash reserves.

feed.title: UnitedHealth, Humana, CVS Shares Get Crushed As Trump Administration Proposes Lower-Than-Expected Medicare Insurer Rates
feed.summary: Shares of major health insurers UnitedHealth Group, Humana, and CVS Health dropped significantly after hours following reports that the Trump administration plans to propose "roughly flat" Medicare insurer rates for 2027, an increase of only 0.09%. This proposal is much lower than the 4% to 6% increase analysts had anticipated, causing concern across the industry. The Medicare agency is also expected to target billing practices that have historically been very profitable for insurers.

feed.title: Seagate Technology stock price jumps ahead of Jan. 27 earnings; STX tops $370 intraday
feed.summary: Seagate Technology's stock price surged by 3.5% in after-hours trading, reaching $358.14 and peaking at $370.24 intraday, ahead of its earnings release on January 27. The rally is attributed to the AI wave, with storage stocks benefiting from increased data center capacity and demand for bulk storage. Investors are keen on management's guidance, especially regarding growth and supply constraints, as the company's performance could lead to swift profit-taking if expectations are not met.

feed.title: HII Names Daniel Marks Vice President of Contracts and Pricing at Ingalls Shipbuilding
feed.summary: HII announced the appointment of Daniel Marks as vice president of contracts and pricing at its Ingalls Shipbuilding division. Marks succeeds Stephen Fitts, who is moving to vice president of supply chain management. This move follows the retirement of Scott Weldon and signifies Marks's increased responsibility in contract administration, estimating, pricing, and compliance.

feed.title: News Corp Cancels 282,012 Class A Shares in Capital Management Move
feed.summary: News Corporation has cancelled 282,012 Class A common shares on January 23, 2026, as part of a capital management move through a buy-back. This action reduces the company's issued capital and is expected to modestly consolidate ownership for existing shareholders. The stock currently holds a "Hold" rating from analysts with a price target of A$47.00.

feed.title: Arista Networks Inc. stock outperforms competitors on strong trading day
feed.summary: Arista Networks Inc. (ANET) saw its stock rise 1.76% to $292.03 on a strong trading day, outperforming rivals such as Cisco Systems Inc. and Hewlett Packard Enterprise Co. The company's stock closed above its 52-week high, while the S&P 500 also recorded gains.

feed.title: Why Seagate Technology (STX) Stock Is Up Today
feed.summary: Seagate Technology (STX) stock rose today after several analysts increased their price targets for the data storage manufacturer. The optimism stems from strong demand for the company's new 32TB hard disk drives, especially for AI-driven video applications, and positive sentiment ahead of its fiscal second-quarter report. BNP Paribas also upgraded the stock, citing strong data center storage demand, suggesting a prolonged upcycle for the company.

feed.title: Seagate Technology Holdings PLC stock outperforms competitors on strong trading day
feed.summary: Seagate Technology Holdings PLC's stock experienced a strong trading day, outperforming competitors. The article details the company's stock performance relative to its rivals, highlighting its positive trend in the market.

feed.title: Phillips 66 Wood River Refinery invests $1.3 million in community
feed.summary: The Phillips 66 Wood River Refinery invested $1.3 million in the Metro East region in 2025 through corporate contributions, employee giving, and volunteer programs. This comprehensive support, including direct contributions, United Way funds, and matching gifts, benefited over 100 regional organizations focusing on education, environmental sustainability, community safety, and social advancement. The refinery's manager, Melissa Erker, highlighted that this significant investment reflects the collective commitment of their employees to strengthen the community.

feed.title: PNC Financial Completes $3 Billion Multi-Tranche Debt Offering
feed.summary: PNC Financial Services Group, Inc. recently completed a $3 billion multi-tranche public debt offering. This offering, consisting of subordinated and senior notes, aims to strengthen PNC's long-term funding, improve its capital markets profile, and support its regulatory capital structure. TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates PNC as "Outperform" due to strong financial quality, a positive earnings outlook, and supportive valuation, despite some concerns about recent revenue decline and near-term integration/credit-cost headwinds.

feed.title: After-hours movers: Humana, UnitedHealth, CVS Health, Sanmina and more
feed.summary: Humana, UnitedHealth, and CVS Health shares fell significantly in after-hours trading after the Trump administration proposed lower-than-expected Medicare Advantage payment rates for 2027. Sanmina also saw a drop after providing disappointing Q2 2026 revenue guidance, while Nucor fell after missing consensus estimates on its quarterly results.

feed.title: Sherwin-Williams Slid 3% Last Week. Here’s How Much the Stock Could Rise by 2026
feed.summary: Sherwin-Williams (SHW) stock declined 3% last week, closing near $350, following a Deutsche Bank downgrade due to valuation concerns and a slower earnings outlook. Despite the pullback, TIKR's valuation model suggests a target price of $400, implying a 14.8% upside over the next 1.9 years, based on revenue growth, operating margins, and exit P/E multiple assumptions. The company's future performance is expected to be driven by execution, pricing power, and margin stability rather than a near-term valuation reset.

feed.title: RTX stock slips after-hours ahead of Q4 results — what Wall Street is watching
feed.summary: RTX shares slipped 0.9% in after-hours trading ahead of its Q4 earnings report, which investors are keenly anticipating for insights into the 2026 outlook, cash flow, and updates on Pratt & Whitney’s engine inspection program. The report, coming on Tuesday, is crucial as options markets suggest a sharper-than-normal post-earnings stock movement, with analysts also monitoring the broader economic indicators and the Federal Reserve's upcoming decision. Investors will be particularly focused on guidance over past results, especially regarding the impact of engine inspection costs on margins and the gap between reported earnings and cash flow.

feed.title: Insider Selling: Microchip Technology (NASDAQ:MCHP) CEO Sells $1,465,912.80 in Stock
feed.summary: Microchip Technology (NASDAQ:MCHP) CEO Steve Sanghi recently sold 18,509 shares of the company's stock for $1,465,912.80, reducing his ownership by 0.18%. Despite this insider selling, the company has a "Moderate Buy" consensus analyst rating and recently beat quarterly EPS estimates. Microchip Technology continues to pay a quarterly dividend, and institutional investors have been increasing their holdings.

feed.title: Christine Bellon Sells 1,371 Shares of Beam Therapeutics (NASDAQ:BEAM) Stock
feed.summary: Christine Bellon, an insider at Beam Therapeutics (NASDAQ:BEAM), recently sold 1,371 shares of the company's stock for a total of $46,614.00, reducing her position by 1.41%. This follows a previous sale of 18,629 shares earlier in January. Beam Therapeutics has shown a 32.2% year-over-year revenue decline, missing EPS and revenue estimates, although analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with a target price of $43.80.

feed.title: Union Pacific (UNP) Faces Near-Term Pressure After Merger Setback, Susquehanna Says
feed.summary: Susquehanna expects Union Pacific (UNP) shares to trade modestly lower after the US Surface Transportation Board rejected the company’s proposed merger with Norfolk Southern due to incomplete information. Despite the setback, the decision was "without prejudice," allowing the companies to resubmit the application once gaps are addressed. Susquehanna maintains a Buy rating on Union Pacific, believing the deal will eventually be approved.

feed.title: SurgePays (NASDAQ: SURG) Strengthens Financials Expanding Revenue Streams Across Wireless, Fintech, and Retail Media
feed.summary: SurgePays (NASDAQ: SURG) has strengthened its financial position through a successful public offering, raising approximately $2.5 million. This capital infusion will support the company's transformation into a multi-vertical wireless and fintech platform, expanding revenue streams across Lifeline wireless services, prepaid mobile, embedded fintech, and MVNE infrastructure. The company aims to accelerate growth in higher-margin initiatives like ClearLine and ProgramBenefits, leveraging existing retail footprint and payment infrastructure for long-term margin expansion.

feed.title: Textron E-Z-GO launches Pace Technology Onyx in-vehicle solution
feed.summary: Textron E-Z-GO has launched Onyx, the next generation in-vehicle solution for its Pace Technology platform, available on E-Z-GO and Cushman ELiTE series vehicles. Onyx features an ultrawide high-definition screen, precise GPS with optional RTK technology for centimeter accuracy, and enhanced geofencing capabilities. This new system aims to improve the on-course experience for golfers with accurate yardages and provides golf course operators with better vehicle management and communication tools.

feed.title: 'Major economic development': Village announces Target has purchased long-vacant Kmart in Round Lake Beach
feed.summary: Target Corporation has purchased the long-vacant Kmart building in Round Lake Beach's Rollins Crossing Shopping Center, a move hailed by village officials as a "major economic development." The 190,000-square-foot building, empty since 2013, will be demolished to make way for a new Target store. This acquisition is part of Mayor Scott Nickles' primary goal to revitalize the area and marks a significant step in transforming the shopping center.

feed.title: Truist Sees Slightly Better Long-Term Earnings Power at M&T Bank (MTB)
feed.summary: Truist has raised its price target for M&T Bank Corporation (MTB) to $230 from $217, maintaining a Hold rating, after the bank surpassed fourth-quarter earnings expectations. Despite slightly higher expenses and lower buybacks than anticipated, Truist's 2027 EPS estimate for M&T was revised upwards to $22 from $21. This adjustment reflects improved net interest income, a rebound in mortgage banking, and stable credit quality, with the bank projecting $7.2 billion to $7.35 billion in net interest income for 2026.

feed.title: Revvity declares $0.07 dividend
feed.summary: Revvity has announced a quarterly dividend of $0.07 per share. This declaration signifies the company's commitment to returning value to its shareholders. Investors of record will receive this payment on the designated date.

feed.title: Alexandria Real Estate Q4 FFO beats as leasing volume stays solid (ARE:NYSE)
feed.summary: Alexandria Real Estate Equities (ARE) reported a Q4 2025 double-beat on headline results, driven by solid leasing volume. The life-science-focused REIT also reaffirmed its full-year 2026 guidance for adjusted FFO per share.

feed.title: Pinnacle West Sets Date for 2025 Fourth-Quarter and Full-Year Financial Results, Webcast/Conference Call
feed.summary: Pinnacle West Capital Corp. (NYSE: PNW) has announced that its 2025 fourth-quarter and full-year financial results will be released on Wednesday, February 25, 2026, before U.S. financial markets open. Following the release, management will host a live webcast and conference call at 11 a.m. ET (9 a.m. Arizona time) to discuss the results and recent developments. The company provides details for accessing both the live session and replay options for the webcast and audio call.

feed.title: Arista Networks Inc. stock outperforms competitors on strong trading day
feed.summary: Arista Networks Inc. (ANET) saw its stock rise by 5.41% to $143.72 on Monday, outperforming the broader market which also experienced a positive trading session. The S&P 500 Index rose 0.50% and the Dow Jones Industrial Average gained 0.64%. Despite the strong day, Arista Networks Inc. closed 12.87% below its 52-week high.

feed.title: Steel Dynamics Inc. stock underperforms Monday when compared to competitors
feed.summary: Shares of Steel Dynamics Inc. (STLD) fell 4.41% on Monday, closing at $173.32, despite a positive trading day for the broader market with the S&P 500 and Dow Jones Industrial Average both rising. The closing price was 5.19% below its 52-week high of $182.81, achieved just days prior on January 22nd.

feed.title: Utility serving 1.4M Arizona homes and businesses to detail 2025 results Feb. 25
feed.summary: Pinnacle West Capital Corp. (NYSE: PNW) announced it will release its 2025 fourth-quarter and full-year financial results on Wednesday, February 25, 2026, before U.S. financial markets open. Management will host a live webcast and conference call on the same day at 11 a.m. ET (9 a.m. Arizona time) to discuss results and recent developments. Pinnacle West, through its subsidiary Arizona Public Service, provides electricity to approximately 1.4 million Arizona homes and businesses.

feed.title: Xos expands Hub lineup with three capacity options, making mobile charging accessible to all fleets
feed.summary: Xos, Inc. has expanded its Xos Hub™ mobile energy storage system lineup with three new capacity options: 210 kWh, 420 kWh, and 630 kWh, starting at $158,000. These new configurations aim to provide rapid-deployment charging infrastructure for electric commercial vehicles, making mobile charging accessible and economically viable for fleets of all sizes and duty cycles. The Hub units offer flexible and quick installation, significantly reducing the time and cost associated with traditional charging infrastructure, and will begin customer deliveries in Q1 2026.

feed.title: Watch Intercontinental Exchange CFO’s UBS conference talk online Feb. 9
feed.summary: Intercontinental Exchange (ICE) announced that its CFO, Warren Gardiner, will present at the UBS Financial Services Conference on February 9 at 11:20 a.m. ET. The presentation will be available via live webcast and replay on ICE's investor relations website. ICE is a Fortune 500 company providing financial technology and data services, including operating the New York Stock Exchange.

feed.title: STARZ TO RELEASE FOURTH QUARTER EARNINGS FOR CALENDAR 2025 AND HOLD ANALYST AND INVESTOR CONFERENCE CALL FOLLOWING MARKET CLOSE ON THURSDAY, FEBRUARY 26 – Company Announcement - FT.com
feed.summary: STARZ (NASDAQ: STRZ) announced its plan to release fourth-quarter financial results for calendar year 2025 on Thursday, February 26th. Following the market close, senior management will host an analyst and investor conference call at 2:00 PM PT / 5:00 PM ET to discuss the results. The company, known as a premium entertainment destination, also provided contact information for investor and press inquiries.

feed.title: Super Micro Computer subsidiary secures $710M credit facilities
feed.summary: Super Micro Computer's Taiwan subsidiary has secured $710 million in revolving credit facilities from various banks, with an option to increase the total to $2 billion. These funds will be used for procuring components, raw materials, and general corporate purposes, including working capital and business expansion. The facilities are guaranteed by Super Micro Computer Inc. and are secured by assets in Taiwan.

feed.title: Constellation Energy stock price dips as Winter Storm Fern strains power markets ahead of the Fed
feed.summary: Constellation Energy's stock price fell 1.2% to $285.66 amidst Winter Storm Fern, which has strained eastern U.S. power markets and caused widespread outages. The storm also pushed natural gas futures to their highest close since December 2022, increasing fuel costs for generators. Traders are closely watching the ongoing storm impact, which presents both opportunities and risks for power producers, as well as the upcoming Federal Reserve policy announcement.

feed.title: Booking Holdings (BKNG) stock price rises into the close as Fed week kicks off — what investors watch next
feed.summary: Booking Holdings (BKNG) shares rose slightly as the stock market closed, with investors now looking ahead to the Federal Reserve's policy meeting this week and Booking's upcoming earnings report on February 18. Despite a mixed performance in the travel sector, Booking's stock gained 0.5% in late Monday trading. The company's future performance will depend on travel demand trends and how it manages competition and potential shifts in consumer spending.

feed.title: Atmos Energy (ATO) Gains Support From Utility Sector Repricing, Morgan Stanley Says
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley raised its price target on Atmos Energy Corporation (NYSE: ATO) to $180 from $172, maintaining an Equal Weight rating, following a repricing in the utilities sector. This adjustment comes as utilities have lagged the S&P 500, shaping new expectations for the group. As a regulated natural gas utility serving millions across eight states, Atmos Energy benefits from predictable, government-approved returns and a significant, hard-to-replicate infrastructure network.

feed.title: Barclays Turns More Constructive on Garmin (GRMN) as Valuation Looks Undemanding
feed.summary: Barclays upgraded Garmin (GRMN) to Equal Weight from Underweight, increasing its price target to $217 from $208. The upgrade was driven by an "undemanding" valuation, Garmin's diversified business lines, and strong momentum in wearables. This positive outlook followed the unveiling of a new automotive OEM proof-of-concept with Meta, integrating Neural Band technology for intuitive in-car infotainment control.

feed.title: General Motors Q4 Earnings Preview: Auto Giant Goes For 14th Straight Double Beat
feed.summary: General Motors (NYSE: GM) is expected to report its Q4 earnings, aiming for its 14th consecutive revenue beat and 13th EPS beat. The company is navigating a complex strategy of promoting EV growth while scaling back certain EV efforts to focus on more profitable traditional vehicles and U.S. production. Analysts have raised price targets ahead of the earnings report.

feed.title: CVS Health, UnitedHealth Group stocks tumble on lower Medicare rate proposal
feed.summary: Shares of major health insurers, including CVS Health and UnitedHealth Group, plummeted in after-hours trading following a proposal by the Trump administration for significantly lower-than-expected Medicare Advantage payment rates for 2027. The Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services (CMS) plans to increase payments by only 0.09% on average, far below analyst projections of 4% to 6% increases. This move, which also seeks to eliminate a "lucrative industry billing practice," is critical for these insurers whose core business segments rely heavily on Medicare Advantage plans.

feed.title: Susquehanna Sees CSX Refocusing on Fundamentals Under New CEO
feed.summary: Susquehanna raised its price target on CSX Corporation to $39 from $38, maintaining a Neutral rating, following the company's fourth-quarter results. Under new CEO Steve Angel, CSX is reportedly focusing on fundamental improvements like lower costs and stronger cash flow. Despite mixed Q4 results with missed revenue and profit expectations due to weaker industrial demand, the company's outlook for 200-300 basis points operating margin expansion in 2026 led to a stock increase in extended trading.

feed.title: RTX Q4 earnings on deck: What to expect
feed.summary: This article provides a brief preview of what to expect from RTX's upcoming Q4 earnings report. Investors will be looking for key financial metrics and any updates on the company's performance. The information will be released upon the announcement of earnings.

feed.title: Earnings Flash (WRB) W. R. Berkley Corporation Reports Q4 Revenue $3.72B
feed.summary: W. R. Berkley Corporation (WRB) has reported its Q4 revenue at $3.72 billion. The company also announced that its Q4 operating income and adjusted EPS rose to $1.13 per share, meeting FactSet estimates.

feed.title: Earnings Flash (ARE) Alexandria Real Estate Equities, Inc. Posts Q4 FFO $2.16 per Share, vs. FactSet Est of $2.14
feed.summary: Alexandria Real Estate Equities, Inc. (ARE) reported its Q4 FFO at $2.16 per share, exceeding FactSet's estimate of $2.14. The company also announced Q4 revenue of $754.4 million, surpassing the FactSet estimate of $739.0 million, and provided a full-year 2026 FFO range between $6.25 and $6.55.

feed.title: Redwood Trust Announces Date of Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Financial Results Webcast and Conference Call
feed.summary: Redwood Trust, Inc. announced that it will release its fourth quarter and full year 2025 financial results on Wednesday, February 11, 2026, after the close of the New York Stock Exchange. The company will also hold a conference call and webcast to discuss these results on the same day at 5:00 p.m. Eastern Time. Details for accessing the webcast and participating in the conference call are provided in the announcement.

feed.title: Ex-Weatherford CEO and Goldman dealmaker join ONEOK board
feed.summary: ONEOK, Inc. (NYSE: OKE) has appointed Mark A. McCollum and Precious Williams Owodunni as independent directors to its board, effective January 23, 2026. McCollum, former CEO of Weatherford International and CFO of Halliburton, brings deep energy-industry and financial expertise. Owodunni, CEO of Mountaintop Consulting and a former Goldman Sachs vice president, contributes experience in strategy, organizational development, and corporate governance.

feed.title: Johnson Controls Appoints Susan Hughes to lead Asia Pacific Region
feed.summary: Johnson Controls has appointed Susan Hughes as vice president and president, Asia Pacific, where she will report to CEO Joakim Weidemanis and join the company's executive committee. Hughes brings decades of operational experience from Emerson in the Asia Pacific region, and she will focus on strengthening execution and accelerating growth opportunities. She succeeds Anu Rathninde, who will depart at the end of February.

feed.title: Johnson Controls Appoints Susan Hughes to lead Asia Pacific Region
feed.summary: Johnson Controls has appointed Susan Hughes as vice president and president, Asia Pacific, to strengthen execution and accelerate growth in the region. Hughes, who has decades of experience from Emerson, will report to CEO Joakim Weidemanis and join the company's executive committee. She succeeds Anu Rathninde, who is departing at the end of February.

feed.title: Timberland Bancorp Reports First Fiscal Quarter Net Income of $8.2 Million
feed.summary: Timberland Bancorp, Inc. reported strong first fiscal quarter net income of $8.22 million, or $1.04 per diluted common share, an increase of 20% compared to the prior year. The company saw a 21% increase in earnings per share and raised its quarterly cash dividend by 4% to $0.29 per share. Timberland also expanded its net interest margin and opened a new full-service branch in University Place, WA.

feed.title: Priority Income Fund Announces Redemption of $19.5 Million of its 6.000% Series J Term Preferred Stock Due 2028
feed.summary: Priority Income Fund announced it will redeem 790,000 shares of its 6.000% Series J Term Preferred Stock Due 2028, totaling $19.5 million. The redemption price will be $25 per share plus accrued but unpaid dividends, with the redemption date set for February 25, 2026. After this redemption, the Fund will still have outstanding shares of its Series D, K, and L Preferred Stocks.

feed.title: Insurers Drop on US Proposal to Keep Medicare Payment Rates Flat
feed.summary: Shares of major US insurers dropped significantly after the US proposed keeping payments to private Medicare plans flat for the next year, which disappointed investors. UnitedHealth Group Inc. fell 9.3%, CVS Health Corp. dropped 10%, and Humana Inc. sank over 15% in after-hours trading. Insurers have been facing pressure on profits due to increasing care expenses and what they consider inadequate government funding.
